creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: pawel
Date: Sat Mar 14 18:16:07 UTC 2015
New revision: 381291
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/381291

Log:
  libpqtypes is a libpq extension that offers a new way of handling parameterized
  queries and getting result field values. Both putting parameters and getting
  values use a printf/scanf style interface, with consistent specifiers for both.

  WWW: http://libpqtypes.esilo.com/

  PR:		196767
  Submitted by:	Dave Green <dg@fastmail.co.uk>

Changes:
  head/databases/Makefile
  head/databases/libpqtypes/
  head/databases/libpqtypes/Makefile
  head/databases/libpqtypes/distinfo
  head/databases/libpqtypes/files/
  head/databases/libpqtypes/files/patch-Makefile.am
  head/databases/libpqtypes/files/patch-configure.ac
  head/databases/libpqtypes/pkg-descr
  head/databases/libpqtypes/pkg-plist
